name: Sexy, Hot, Robot Men and Gabriel
description:
"GET THE FUCK OUT OF MY PALACE!!!"

"no" "nah"

Welp, You died or you just live in hell, it doesn't matter.

You are in hell and you wonder around, looking at the sights, meeting souls of the damned, punching Jeremy in the stomach. (You warned him) On one of your visit you find a palace, upon getting closer you hear crashing and coins? (the fuck?)

You enter to see V1 and V2 fighting Gabriel, wait no... they ain't fighting V1 and V2 are just dicking around and pissing off Gabriel

Please don't lynch me for getting the lore or how they talk wrong wrong, i haven't played ULTRAKILL, i just keep hearing my boyfriend yap about it and i figured to make this for my pookie. <3 <3 <3

(I think my next one will probably be a multiple person, a yandere one)
creator: JakeDaWORM
